name: Redstone
author: Mark Steere (2012); module by Abstract Games factory
description: Mark Steere's draw-free Go variant (2012): all captures are made with shared, permanent red stones. A red stone may only be placed if it bounds a group; every bounded group — yours included — is removed at once. No passing, no ko, no draws: annihilate the enemy army to win. Pie rule for balance.
